name: TimePicker

parameters.name: Use24Hour
parameters.description: When true renders a 24-hour clock; when false renders 12-hour with AM/PM. When null (default) the picker derives the choice from EffectiveCulture's ShortTimePattern — de-DE, fr-FR and similar see 24-hour; en-US sees 12-hour.

parameters.name: Culture
parameters.description: Overrides CurrentCulture for 24h/12h detection and AM/PM designators. Leave null to honour ASP.NET request localization.

enums.name: TimePickerVariant
enums.description: Visual style of the picker. List renders the existing scrollable hour/minute columns inside a popover (default). Wheel renders inline iOS-style snap-scrolling columns. The Wheel variant doesn't show seconds.

parameters.name: Use24Hour
parameters.description: When true renders a 24-hour clock; when false renders 12-hour with AM/PM. When null (default), derived from ShortTimePattern.

mdSummary:
# TimePicker

Time-of-day picker with 12h/24h formats.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Specialized
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/time-picker

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| TimePicker | Variant | `TimePickerVariant` | `TimePickerVariant.List` |  |
| TimePicker | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| TimePicker | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| TimePicker | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| TimePicker | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| TimePicker | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| TimePicker | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| TimePicker | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| TimePicker | Value | `TimeSpan?` | `` |  |
| TimePicker | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<TimeSpan?>` | `` |  |
| TimePicker | Use24Hour | `bool?` | `` | When true renders a 24-hour clock; when false renders 12-hour with AM/PM. When null (default) the picker derives the choice from EffectiveCulture's ShortTimePattern — de-DE, fr-FR and similar see 24-hour; en-US sees 12-hour. |
| TimePicker | ShowSeconds | `bool` | `` |  |
| TimePicker | MinuteStep | `int` | `1` |  |
| TimePicker | SecondStep | `int` | `1` |  |
| TimePicker | Placeholder | `string?` | `` |  |
| TimePicker | Culture | `System.Globalization.CultureInfo?` | `` | Overrides CurrentCulture for 24h/12h detection and AM/PM designators. Leave null to honour ASP.NET request localization. |
| TimePicker | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| TimePicker | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TimePicker | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| TimeWheelPicker | Value | `TimeSpan?` | `` |  |
| TimeWheelPicker | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<TimeSpan?>` | `` |  |
| TimeWheelPicker | Use24Hour | `bool?` | `` | When true renders a 24-hour clock; when false renders 12-hour with AM/PM. When null (default), derived from ShortTimePattern. |
| TimeWheelPicker | MinuteStep | `int` | `1` |  |
| TimeWheelPicker | Culture | `CultureInfo?` | `` |  |
| TimeWheelPicker | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TimeWheelPicker | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
